title: Why Rieff, Why Little Worlds
description: A first scaffold for why Philip Rieff is a good test case for building scholarship from small, revisable primitives.

title: Citation as Primitive
description: A placeholder for turning one verified Rieff citation into a small world of context, question, and use.

title: A Paper Idea as a Little World
description: A sketch of how a research question about Rieff can stay small enough to test before becoming an essay.

title: Paragraph as Experiment
description: A prototype paragraph workflow: make one claim, name the needed source, and leave room for revision.
